form.formComment: Four-year-old filly by Footstepsinthesand out of Magic Bear who has taken a long time to make it to the track. Profiles well and worth watching for any market moves.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Four-year-old filly by Footstepsinthesand out of Magic Bear who has taken a long time to make it to the track. Profiles well and worth watching for any market moves.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 2nd of 8 at this track on April 1 over 1207m, 3 len behind Ocean's Breath carrying 61kg at $4.50. Previously second-up 3rd of 11 at this track on November 5 over 1207m, 1.75 len behind Back To Me carrying 59kg at $3.80. Fitter for that run and will be tough to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: First-starter by Bated Breath out of Mareera. Likely to be better for this run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Bated Breath out of Mareera. Likely to be better for this run.

form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when ran last of 15 at Fairyhouse on July 9 over 1207m, 15 len behind Quiet Mutiny carrying 58kg at $101. Hard to see her in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(7.5). Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when ran last of 15 at Fairyhouse on July 9 over 1207m, 15 len behind Quiet Mutiny carrying 58kg at $101. Hard to see her in the finish.

form.formComment: Jumped at long odds at debut, 4th of 12 at this track on February 27 over 1207m, 1.75 len behind Oxford Circus carrying 57.5kg at $41. Promising three-year-old filly who has plenty of scope for improvement.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(8). Jumped at long odds at debut, 4th of 12 at this track on February 27 over 1207m, 1.75 len behind Oxford Circus carrying 57.5kg at $41. Promising three-year-old filly who has plenty of scope for improvement.

form.formComment: First-starter by Expert Eye out of Pavlosk. Looks set to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Expert Eye out of Pavlosk. Looks set to run well.

form.formComment: At debut, 8th of 12 at Curragh on March 28 over 1207m, 6 len behind Opalite carrying 58.5kg at $17. Worth another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4). At debut, 8th of 12 at Curragh on March 28 over 1207m, 6 len behind Opalite carrying 58.5kg at $17. Worth another chance.

form.formComment: Back after a long spell. Finished off last preparation 4th of 13 at this track on September 26 over 1408m, 2 len behind Yellowstone Lake carrying 58kg at $13. When resuming last campaign 4th of 14 at Leopardstown on July 17 over 1307m, 2.5 len behind Fairy Oak carrying 56.5kg at $17. Not far away latest and expected to go close with further improvement.
